home_title: Career guidance built for Bangladeshi graduates
home_sub: Get AI-powered feedback on your resume, explore career paths, and access resources tailored to the Bangladeshi job market.
feature_ai_desc: Upload your resume and get precise, actionable feedback based on Bangladeshi job market standards.
feature_resources_desc: Browse guides, videos, and articles covering resume writing, interview prep, and job searching in Bangladesh.
feature_paths_desc: Explore career paths across IT, Finance, Science, Engineering, and more.
feature_chatbot_desc: Ask career questions and get guidance on job searching and interviews.
feature_alumni_desc: See real career journeys from Bangladeshi graduates.
feature_lang_desc: Switch the entire platform to Bangla with one click.
